item.title: Sentimental Graffiti Re announced
item.content:encoded:
A remake of the 1998 dating simulation game.

Entergram has announced Sentimental Graffiti Re, a remake of the 1998-released Saturn dating simulation game Sentimental Graffiti. Platforms and a release date were not announced.

The game’s currently revealed cast is as follows:

  • Honoka Sawatari (voiced by Mirai Tachibana)
  • Emiru Nagakura (voiced by Tsubaki Makino)
  • Wakana Ayasaki (voiced by Koharu Miyazawa)
  • Kaho Morii (voiced by Moka Hinata)
  • Manami Sugihara (voiced by Kokona Natsume)
  • Chie Matsuoka (voiced by Kanata Aikawa)

Voice actors for Taeko Adachi, Asuka Hoshino, Miyuki Hosaka, Rurika Yamamoto, Akira Endou, and Yuu Nanase will be determined via audition.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/sentimental-graffiti-re-announced
